summary: Evasive malicious skills identified by Unit42 on ClawHub: santi-text-game, letssendit, pdfcheck, update, and wistec-core (publisher accounts banned).
details: Listed in the Publisher/Skill indicators of compromise from Unit42's February-May 2026 analysis of persistent and evasive malicious skills on ClawHub that evaded ClawScan and VirusTotal screening. Unit42 reported the skills for takedown; OpenClaw banned the accounts and deleted the skills. Unit42 redacted the publisher names.
